top3.sql:
WITH state_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        state,
        COUNT(*) AS total_aliens,
        AVG(age) AS avg_age,
        SUM(CASE WHEN aggressive = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS friendly_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN aggressive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hostile_count
    FROM alien_data
    WHERE state IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY state
),
top_10_states AS (
    SELECT 
        state,
        total_aliens,
        avg_age,
        friendly_count,
        hostile_count,
        CAST(friendly_count AS REAL) /...

WITH top_states AS (
    SELECT 
        state,
        COUNT(*) AS total_aliens,
        AVG(age) AS avg_age,
        SUM(CASE WHEN aggressive = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS friendly_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN aggressive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hostile_count
    FROM alien_data
    WHERE state IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY state
    HAVING AVG(age) > 200
    ORDER BY total_aliens DESC
    LIMIT 10
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS states_with_more_friendly
FROM top_states
WHERE friendly_count > hostile_count...
